title: Mask Personal Access Token Field as Password Input
story: As a product administrator configuring the Tableau integration, I want the Personal Access Token field to be masked like a password input, so that sensitive credentials are not displayed in clear text on screen.
description: Changes the Personal Access Token input field on the Tableau configuration modal from a standard text field to a password-type field. This prevents the token from being displayed in clear text, improving security when users are configuring their Tableau connection in shared or observable environments.
acceptance_criteria: Personal Access Token field displays masked characters instead of clear text
Field type is set to password input
Token value is still correctly submitted when saving configuration
ux_changes: Changed the Personal Access Token input field from text type to password type, masking the token value with dots/bullets.
implementation_notes: Simple field type change from text to password on the Tableau setup modal.
comment_summary: Waqar completed the change on staging and requested review.
